creator: snnn119@gmail.com
text:
The diff file is below.Thanks.
----------------------------------------------------
diff -ruN /usr/ports/devel/loki/Makefile /home/snnn/ports/loki/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/devel/loki/Makefile    Sat Apr 29 04:51:05 2006
+++ /home/snnn/ports/loki/Makefile    Mon Nov  6 22:25:56 2006
@@ -1,33 +1,32 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:    loki
-# Date created:        5 Feb 2006
-# Whom:            Sun Chang-Ming
+# New ports collection makefile for:   loki
+# Date created:        5 Feb 2006
+# Whom:                Charming Sun
 #
-# $FreeBSD: ports/devel/loki/Makefile,v 1.2 2006/04/28 20:51:05 sem Exp $
+# $FreeBSD$
 #
 
-PORTNAME=    loki
-PORTVERSION=    0.1.3
-CATEGORIES=    devel
-MASTER_SITES=    ${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE_EXTENDED}
-MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=    loki-lib
+PORTNAME=      loki
+PORTVERSION=   0.1.5
+CATEGORIES=    devel
+MASTER_SITES=   ${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE_EXTENDED}
+MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=     loki-lib
 
-MAINTAINER=    snnn119@gmail.com
-COMMENT=    A C++ library of common design patterns
+MAINTAINER=    snnn119@gmail.com
+COMMENT=       A C++ library of common design patterns
 
-USE_BZIP2=    yes
-USE_GMAKE=    yes
-USE_GCC=    3.4+
+USE_GZIP=yes
+USE_GMAKE=yes
+USE_GCC=        3.4+
 
-DOCS=        README CHANGES doc/html/* doc/flex/* doc/yasli/*
+DOCS= README CHANGES doc/flex/flex_string.html \
+doc/yasli/Notes.txt \
+doc/yasli/yasli.html
 
 post-install:
 .if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
     ${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
-    ${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}/html
-    ${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}/flex
-    ${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}/yasli
 .for i in ${DOCS}
-    ${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/${i} ${DOCSDIR}/${i%/.*}
+    ${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/${i} ${DOCSDIR}
 .endfor
 .endif
 
diff -ruN /usr/ports/devel/loki/distinfo /home/snnn/ports/loki/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/devel/loki/distinfo    Sat Apr 29 03:59:30 2006
+++ /home/snnn/ports/loki/distinfo    Mon Jun 26 01:38:09 2006
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (loki-0.1.3.tar.bz2) = 7f30d06bcfe0feb18d797f166a02a966
-SHA256 (loki-0.1.3.tar.bz2) = 
1f7aed37eec4afb113f60507955e9621808d4e34b0cb9a3c89c793e57888b65e
-SIZE (loki-0.1.3.tar.bz2) = 704358
+MD5 (loki-0.1.5.tar.gz) = f246e9e91b46d4e55ce36193984697e6
+SHA256 (loki-0.1.5.tar.gz) = 
01ae8b65e286a64017a9fa2eb633d70b5f029b03bb4682f3105148165e3345f5
+SIZE (loki-0.1.5.tar.gz) = 324972
diff -ruN /usr/ports/devel/loki/files/patch-Makefile 
/home/snnn/ports/loki/files/patch-Makefile
--- /usr/ports/devel/loki/files/patch-Makefile    Sat Apr 29 03:59:30 2006
+++ /home/snnn/ports/loki/files/patch-Makefile    Mon Nov  6 22:02:51 2006
@@ -1,19 +1,11 @@
-*** Makefile.bak    Sat Feb 11 12:19:52 2006
---- Makefile    Sat Feb 11 12:19:59 2006
-***************
-*** 1,7 ****
-  DESTDIR := $(CURDIR)/$(DESTDIR)
-   
-! .PHONY: build check install clean
-! build:
-      $(MAKE) -C src
-   
-  check: build
---- 1,7 ----
-  DESTDIR := $(CURDIR)/$(DESTDIR)
-   
-! .PHONY: all check install clean
-! all:
-      $(MAKE) -C src
-   
-  check: build
+--- Makefile.orig    Mon Nov  6 22:01:44 2006
++++ Makefile    Mon Nov  6 22:01:52 2006
+@@ -23,7 +23,7 @@
+     $(MAKE) -C src distclean
+  
+ ifneq ($(OS),Windows)
+-export prefix ?= /usr
++export prefix ?= ${PREFIX}
+  
+ .PHONY: install install-static
+ install:
diff -ruN /usr/ports/devel/loki/files/patch-include-Makefile 
/home/snnn/ports/loki/files/patch-include-Makefile
--- /usr/ports/devel/loki/files/patch-include-Makefile    Sat Apr 29 
03:59:30 2006
+++ /home/snnn/ports/loki/files/patch-include-Makefile    Thu Jan  1 
08:00:00 1970
@@ -1,25 +0,0 @@
-*** include/Makefile.orig    Sat Jan  7 11:19:49 2006
---- include/Makefile    Sat Feb 11 22:41:43 2006
-***************
-*** 1,9 ****
-  .PHONY: install
-  install:
-!     mkdir -p $(DESTDIR)/usr/include/loki
-!     mkdir -p $(DESTDIR)/usr/include/loki/flex
-!     mkdir -p $(DESTDIR)/usr/include/loki/yasli
-!     
-!     install loki/*.h $(DESTDIR)/usr/include/loki
-!     install loki/flex/*.h $(DESTDIR)/usr/include/loki/flex
-!     install loki/yasli/*.h $(DESTDIR)/usr/include/loki/yasli
---- 1,11 ----
-  .PHONY: install
-+ PREFIX=/usr/local
-+  
-  install:
-!     mkdir -p $(PREFIX)/include/loki
-!     mkdir -p $(PREFIX)/include/loki/flex
-!     mkdir -p $(PREFIX)/include/loki/yasli
-!  
-!     install loki/*.h $(PREFIX)/include/loki
-!     install loki/flex/*.h $(PREFIX)/include/loki/flex
-!     install loki/yasli/*.h $(PREFIX)/include/loki/yasli
diff -ruN /usr/ports/devel/loki/files/patch-include-loki-Threads.h 
/home/snnn/ports/loki/files/patch-include-loki-Threads.h
--- /usr/ports/devel/loki/files/patch-include-loki-Threads.h    Thu Jan  
1 08:00:00 1970
+++ /home/snnn/ports/loki/files/patch-include-loki-Threads.h    Mon Nov  
6 20:43:20 2006
@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+--- include/loki/Threads.h.orig    Mon Nov  6 20:39:26 2006
++++ include/loki/Threads.h    Mon Nov  6 20:42:26 2006
+@@ -51,8 +51,8 @@
+  
+ #include <cassert>
+  
+-#if defined(LOKI_CLASS_LEVEL_THREADING) || 
defined(LOKI_OBJECT_LEVEL_THREADING)
+-
++//#if defined(LOKI_CLASS_LEVEL_THREADING) || 
defined(LOKI_OBJECT_LEVEL_THREADING)
++#if 0
+     #define LOKI_DEFAULT_THREADING_NO_OBJ_LEVEL 
::Loki::ClassLevelLockable
+      
+     #if defined(LOKI_CLASS_LEVEL_THREADING) && 
!defined(LOKI_OBJECT_LEVEL_THREADING)
diff -ruN /usr/ports/devel/loki/files/patch-src-Makefile 
/home/snnn/ports/loki/files/patch-src-Makefile
--- /usr/ports/devel/loki/files/patch-src-Makefile    Sat Apr 29 
03:59:30 2006
+++ /home/snnn/ports/loki/files/patch-src-Makefile    Mon Nov  6 
20:34:31 2006
@@ -1,34 +1,21 @@
-*** src/Makefile.orig    Sat Jan  7 11:19:49 2006
---- src/Makefile    Sat Feb 11 22:38:00 2006
-***************
-*** 1,14 ****
-  OBJ = Singleton.o SmallObj.o OrderedStatic.o
-  BIN = ../lib/libloki.a
-  CXXFLAGS = -I../include -Wall -O2 -DNDEBUG
-   
-  $(BIN): $(OBJ)
-      ar rs $(BIN) $(OBJ)
-   
-  .PHONY: clean install
-  install: $(BIN)
-!     mkdir -p $(DESTDIR)/usr/lib
-!     install $(BIN) $(DESTDIR)/usr/lib
-   
-  clean:
-      rm -f $(OBJ) $(BIN)
---- 1,15 ----
-  OBJ = Singleton.o SmallObj.o OrderedStatic.o
-  BIN = ../lib/libloki.a
-  CXXFLAGS = -I../include -Wall -O2 -DNDEBUG
-+ PREFIX=/usr/local
-   
-  $(BIN): $(OBJ)
-      ar rs $(BIN) $(OBJ)
-   
-  .PHONY: clean install
-  install: $(BIN)
-!     mkdir -p $(PREFIX)/lib
-!     install $(BIN) $(PREFIX)/lib
-   
-  clean:
-      rm -f $(OBJ) $(BIN)
+--- src/Makefile.orig    Mon Nov  6 20:06:34 2006
++++ src/Makefile    Mon Nov  6 20:09:28 2006
+@@ -20,10 +20,18 @@
+   LDLIBS = -lpthread
+   RESULT_DIR = ../lib/
+ else
++ifeq ($(OS), FreeBSD)
++  SHARED_LIB_BASE = libloki.so
++  SHARED_LIB_VERSIONED = libloki.so.$(VERSION)
++  LDFLAGS = --shared -Wl,-soname=$(SHARED_LIB_VERSIONED) -fPIC
++  LDLIBS = -pthread
++  RESULT_DIR = ../lib/
++else
+   SHARED_LIB_BASE = libloki.dll
+   LDFLAGS = --shared
+   LDLIBS =
+   RESULT_DIR = ../lib/
++endif
+ endif
+ endif
+  
diff -ruN /usr/ports/devel/loki/files/patch-test-Makefile 
/home/snnn/ports/loki/files/patch-test-Makefile
--- /usr/ports/devel/loki/files/patch-test-Makefile    Thu Jan  1 
08:00:00 1970
+++ /home/snnn/ports/loki/files/patch-test-Makefile    Mon Nov  6 
20:50:39 2006
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+--- test/Makefile.orig    Mon Nov  6 20:45:11 2006
++++ test/Makefile    Mon Nov  6 20:49:04 2006
+@@ -1,5 +1,9 @@
+ export CPPFLAGS = -I../../include -DNDEBUG
++ifeq ($(OS),FreeBSD)
++export LDFLAGS = -L../../lib -pthread
++else
+ export LDFLAGS = -L../../lib
++endif
+ export LDLIBS = -lloki
+  
+ ifeq ($(OS),Windows)
diff -ruN /usr/ports/devel/loki/files/patch-test-SingletonDll-Makefile 
/home/snnn/ports/loki/files/patch-test-SingletonDll-Makefile
--- /usr/ports/devel/loki/files/patch-test-SingletonDll-Makefile    Thu 
Jan  1 08:00:00 1970
+++ /home/snnn/ports/loki/files/patch-test-SingletonDll-Makefile    Mon 
Nov  6 20:36:01 2006
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+--- test/SingletonDll/Makefile.orig    Mon Nov  6 20:23:36 2006
++++ test/SingletonDll/Makefile    Mon Nov  6 20:24:00 2006
+@@ -8,9 +8,15 @@
+   LIB2 = libsingletondll.so
+   SHARED_LIB_FLAG = --shared
+ else
++ifeq ($(OS),FreeBSD)
++  LIB1 = libfoo.so
++  LIB2 = libsingletondll.so
++  SHARED_LIB_FLAG = --shared
++else
+   LIB1 = foo.dll
+   LIB2 = singletondll.dll
+   SHARED_LIB_FLAG = --shared
++endif
+ endif
+ endif
+  
diff -ruN /usr/ports/devel/loki/files/patch-test-SmartPtr-main.cpp 
/home/snnn/ports/loki/files/patch-test-SmartPtr-main.cpp
--- /usr/ports/devel/loki/files/patch-test-SmartPtr-main.cpp    Thu Jan  
1 08:00:00 1970

6 20:36:57 2006

+--- test/SmartPtr/main.cpp.orig    Mon Nov  6 20:25:41 2006
++++ test/SmartPtr/main.cpp    Mon Nov  6 20:26:02 2006
+@@ -998,7 +998,7 @@
+  
+ // 
---------------------------------------------------------------------------- 

+  
+-int main( unsigned int , const char * [] )
++int main(  int , const char * [] )
+ {
+  
+     DoRefLinkTests();
